zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Thorne於1593年1月12日出生在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特時，她的父親Hugh Thorne39歲，母親Ede West41歲。她於1616年之前與Richard Bond "Band"結婚。她於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。她去世於1678年7月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特享年85歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可多爾斯特多爾斯特 諾斯 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Thorne于1593年1月12日出生在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特时，她的父亲Hugh Thorne39岁，母亲Ede West41岁。她于1616年之前与Richard Bond "Band"结婚。她于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。她去世于1678年7月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特享年85岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可多爾斯特多爾斯特 諾斯 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave Seen in the Memorials List

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Thorne was born on 12 January 1593, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, her father, Hugh Thorne, was 39 and her mother, Ede West, was 41. She married Richard Bond "Band" before 1616. She immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. She died on 22 July 1678, in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 85, and was buried in Dorchester North Burying Ground, Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Thorne est née le 12 janvier 1593, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Thorne, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ede West, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Bond "Band" avant 1616. Elle a immigré au Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1678, à Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Dorchester North Burying Ground, Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Thorne am 12. Januar 1593 in Pitminster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Thorne 39 und ihre Mutter Ede West 41. Sie hat vor 1616 Richard Bond "Band" geheiratet. Sie ist 1635 nach Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1678 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Dorchester North Burying Ground, Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Thorne è nata il il 12 gennaio 1593 nel Pitminster, Somerset, England, sua padre, Hugh Thorne, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ede West, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Richard Bond "Band" prima del 1616. Immigrata nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Morì il 22 luglio 1678, nel Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Dorchester North Burying Ground, Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Thorneが1593年1月12日にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで生まれた時，父Hugh Thorneは39歳，母Ede Westは41歳であった。1616年以前にRichard Bond "Band"と結婚した。彼女は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに移住した。彼女は1678年7月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニードールチェスターで85歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクドールチェスタードールチェスター ノース ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Thorne(이)가 1593년 1월 12일 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Thorne(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ede West(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1616년 이전 Richard Bond "Band"(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1678년 7월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 도르체스터에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 도르체스터 도르체스터 노르스 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Thorne nasceu em 12 de janeiro de 1593, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Thorne, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ede West, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Bond "Band" antes 1616. Ela imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1678, em Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Dorchester North Burying Ground, Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Thorne родилась 12 января 1593 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Thorne было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ede West, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Bond "Band" перед 1616 г. Она иммигрировала в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. Она умерла 22 июля 1678 г. в местности дорчестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности дорчестир норт буринг гроунд, дорчестир, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Thorne nació el 12 de enero de 1593, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Thorne, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ede West, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Richard Bond "Band" antes de 1616. Inmigró a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Murió el 22 de julio de 1678, en Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Dorchester North Burying Ground, Dorchester, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
